This report fingerprints GitClaw's durable repo-local memory in the spirit of OpenClaw Markdown memory and Hermes profile/session boundaries. It emits per-memory-file metadata plus one composite snapshot hash only; raw memory bodies, issue bodies, comments, prompts, session transcripts, embedding vectors, credentials, and secret values are not included.
